batch.notes: Seventy-five additional local-only instrumental candidates expanding each focus activity from five to twenty listening candidates: fifteen new 180-second tracks per activity. All tracks are instrumental, contain no lyrics and no speech, and use the immutable pinned ACE-Step 1.5 turbo pipeline (FLAC, 48 kHz stereo, 8 steps, shift 3, ODE, deterministic seeds, 4/4, no random seed). Human listening review remains required before approval or publication.
